profile.name: Shivam Prajapati
profile.tagline: That Brings Your Vision to Life
profile.role: Director of Photography & Creative Video Editor
profile.specialization: Video Editing · Color Grading · Visual Effects
profile.bio: Hi, I'm Shivam Prajapati, a passionate video editor specializing in mobile cinematic editing and social media content creation. I focus on transforming raw footage into visually appealing videos that capture attention and leave a lasting impression. Whether it's a Reel, YouTube video, promotional content, or personal project, I ensure every edit reflects professionalism and creativity.

services.title: Reel Editing
services.desc: Engaging short-form content optimized for Instagram Reels, Shorts, and social media growth.

services.title: YouTube Video Editing
services.desc: Professional editing that improves viewer retention and enhances storytelling.

services.title: Color Grading & Effects
services.desc: Cinematic color correction and visual effects to elevate your content.

services.title: Promotional Videos
services.desc: Creative edits designed for businesses, products, events, and personal branding.

experience.summary: Creating high-quality videos with cinematic storytelling, smooth transitions, engaging effects, and professional finishing.
highlights: Edited 100+ high-end videos for diverse clients.
Consistently maintained fast turnaround times without compromising quality.
Built long-term client relationships through professional communication.
